name: BottomNav
description: Mobile-first bottom navigation bar with icon items.

api.name: BottomNav
api.description: Mobile-first bottom navigation bar with icon items.

parameters.name: ChildContent
parameters.description: The BottomNavItem (and optionally BottomNavFab) elements rendered inside the nav bar.

parameters.name: AriaLabel
parameters.description: Accessible label for the nav landmark. Defaults to "Bottom navigation".

parameters.name: Fixed
parameters.description: When true (default), pins to the bottom of the viewport with position: fixed. Set false to render inline.

parameters.name: ReserveSpace
parameters.description: When true (and Fixed is on), also renders an in-flow, aria-hidden spacer equal to the nav's height plus the bottom safe-area inset, so the fixed bar never overlaps the end of the page content — no consumer padding-bottom hack needed. The height is driven by the --lumeo-bottom-nav-height CSS variable (default 3.5rem); override it if your nav is taller (e.g. the Pill variant or two-line labels). Place BottomNav at the end of the scrolling content so the spacer reserves room there. Default false.

parameters.name: Variant
parameters.description: Visual variant. Default is a solid bar with a top border; Pill is a floating centered pill.

parameters.name: AnimatedIndicator
parameters.description: When true, each BottomNavItem gets smooth background-color and color transitions, and the small active pill transitions its transform with a spring easing. Default is false.

parameters.name: Class
parameters.description: Additional CSS classes merged onto the root nav element.

parameters.name: AdditionalAttributes
parameters.description: Unmatched attributes are splatted onto the root nav element.

examples.title: Basic
examples.code:
<BottomNav>
    <BottomNavItem Href="/" Label="Home">
        <IconContent><Icon Name="House" Size="Lumeo.Size.Sm" /></IconContent>
    </BottomNavItem>
    <BottomNavItem Href="/search" Label="Search">
        <IconContent><Icon Name="Search" Size="Lumeo.Size.Sm" /></IconContent>
    </BottomNavItem>
    <BottomNavItem Href="/inbox" Label="Inbox">
        <IconContent><Icon Name="Inbox" Size="Lumeo.Size.Sm" /></IconContent>
    </BottomNavItem>
    <BottomNavItem Href="/profile" Label="Profile">
        <IconContent><Icon Name="User" Size="Lumeo.Size.Sm" /></IconContent>
    </BottomNavItem>
</BottomNav>

examples.title: With Center FAB
examples.code:
<BottomNav>
    <BottomNavItem Href="/" Label="Home" />
    <BottomNavItem Href="/search" Label="Search" />

    <BottomNavFab AriaLabel="Create" OnClick="HandleCreate">
        <Icon Name="Plus" Size="Lumeo.Size.Md" />
    </BottomNavFab>

    <BottomNavItem Href="/inbox" Label="Inbox" />
    <BottomNavItem Href="/profile" Label="Profile" />
</BottomNav>

examples.title: Animated Transitions
examples.code:
<BottomNav AnimatedIndicator="true">
    <BottomNavItem Href="/" Label="Home" />
    <BottomNavItem Href="/search" Label="Search" />
    <BottomNavItem Href="/inbox" Label="Inbox" />
    <BottomNavItem Href="/profile" Label="Profile" />
</BottomNav>

parameters.name: Href
parameters.description: Optional destination URL. When set, renders as an anchor; otherwise a button.

parameters.name: AriaLabel
parameters.description: Accessible label. Required because FABs are usually icon-only. Defaults to "Primary action".

parameters.name: OnClick
parameters.description: Invoked when the FAB is activated. Ignored when Href is set (the anchor navigates instead).

parameters.name: ChildContent
parameters.description: The icon (or other content) rendered inside the floating action button.

parameters.name: Class
parameters.description: Additional CSS classes merged onto the root button/anchor element.

parameters.name: AdditionalAttributes
parameters.description: Unmatched attributes are splatted onto the root button/anchor element.

events.name: OnClick
events.description: Invoked when the FAB is activated. Ignored when Href is set (the anchor navigates instead).

parameters.name: Href
parameters.description: Destination URL. When set, item renders as an <a>; otherwise as a <button>.

parameters.name: Label
parameters.description: Text label shown under the icon. Also used as the accessible name.

parameters.name: IconContent
parameters.description: Icon slot (use Icon or <SvgGlyph>). The Content suffix avoids colliding with the <Icon> component.

parameters.name: Badge
parameters.description: Optional badge (count, dot, or any content) shown on the icon. Int, string, or RenderFragment.

parameters.name: IconSize
parameters.description: Size class applied to the icon container. Defaults to h-5 w-5 to match the original visual. Override to fit larger content like avatars (e.g. "h-7 w-7").

parameters.name: IsActive
parameters.description: Manual active-state override. When null, active is inferred from the current route matching Href.

parameters.name: OnClick
parameters.description: Click handler — fires for both <a> and <button> renderings (link navigation still proceeds).

parameters.name: PressEffect
parameters.description: Visual feedback when the item is pressed. Default is None. Scale is recommended for a tactile feel on mobile.

parameters.name: Class
parameters.description: Additional CSS classes merged onto the root button/anchor element.

parameters.name: AdditionalAttributes
parameters.description: Unmatched attributes are splatted onto the root button/anchor element.

events.name: OnClick
events.description: Click handler — fires for both <a> and <button> renderings (link navigation still proceeds).

slots.name: ChildContent
slots.description: The BottomNavItem (and optionally BottomNavFab) elements rendered inside the nav bar.

slots.name: ChildContent
slots.description: The icon (or other content) rendered inside the floating action button.

slots.name: IconContent
slots.description: Icon slot (use Icon or <SvgGlyph>). The Content suffix avoids colliding with the <Icon> component.

slots.name: Badge
slots.description: Optional badge (count, dot, or any content) shown on the icon. Int, string, or RenderFragment.

mdSummary:
# BottomNav

Mobile-first bottom navigation bar with icon items.

**Package:** `Lumeo` · **Category:** Navigation
**Docs:** https://lumeo.nativ.sh/components/bottom-nav

## Parameters
| Owner | Name | Type | Default | Description |
|---|---|---|---|---|
| BottomNav | ChildContent | `RenderFragment?` | `` | The BottomNavItem (and optionally BottomNavFab) elements rendered inside the nav bar. |
| BottomNav | AriaLabel | `string?` | `` | Accessible label for the nav landmark. Defaults to "Bottom navigation". |
| BottomNav | Fixed | `bool` | `true` | When true (default), pins to the bottom of the viewport with position: fixed. Set false to render inline. |
| BottomNav | ReserveSpace | `bool` | `` | When true (and Fixed is on), also renders an in-flow, aria-hidden spacer equal to the nav's height plus the bottom safe-area inset, so the fixed bar never overlaps the end of the page content — no consumer padding-bottom hack needed. The height is driven by the --lumeo-bottom-nav-height CSS variable (default 3.5rem); override it if your nav is taller (e.g. the Pill variant or two-line labels). Place BottomNav at the end of the scrolling content so the spacer reserves room there. Default false. |
| BottomNav | Variant | `BottomNavVariant` | `BottomNavVariant.Default` | Visual variant. Default is a solid bar with a top border; Pill is a floating centered pill. |
| BottomNav | AnimatedIndicator | `bool` | `` | When true, each BottomNavItem gets smooth background-color and color transitions, and the small active pill transitions its transform with a spring easing. Default is false. |
| BottomNav | Class | `string?` | `` | Additional CSS classes merged onto the root nav element. |
| BottomNav | AdditionalAttributes | `Dictionary<string, object>?` | `` | Unmatched attributes are splatted onto the root nav element. |
| BottomNavFab | Href | `string?` | `` | Optional destination URL. When set, renders as an anchor; otherwise a button. |
| BottomNavFab | AriaLabel | `string?` | `` | Accessible label. Required because FABs are usually icon-only. Defaults to "Primary action". |
| BottomNavFab | OnClick | `EventCallback` | `` | Invoked when the FAB is activated. Ignored when Href is set (the anchor navigates instead). |
| BottomNavFab | ChildContent | `RenderFragment?` | `` | The icon (or other content) rendered inside the floating action button. |
| BottomNavFab | Class | `string?` | `` | Additional CSS classes merged onto the root button/anchor element. |
| BottomNavFab | AdditionalAttributes | `Dictionary<string, object>?` | `` | Unmatched attributes are splatted onto the root button/anchor element. |
| BottomNavItem | Context | `BottomNav.BottomNavContext?` | `` |  |
| BottomNavItem | Href | `string?` | `` | Destination URL. When set, item renders as an <a>; otherwise as a <button>. |
| BottomNavItem | Label | `string?` | `` | Text label shown under the icon. Also used as the accessible name. |
| BottomNavItem | IconContent | `RenderFragment?` | `` | Icon slot (use Icon or <SvgGlyph>). The Content suffix avoids colliding with the <Icon> component. |
| BottomNavItem | Badge | `RenderFragment?` | `` | Optional badge (count, dot, or any content) shown on the icon. Int, string, or RenderFragment. |
| BottomNavItem | IconSize | `string` | `"h-5 w-5"` | Size class applied to the icon container. Defaults to h-5 w-5 to match the original visual. Override to fit larger content like avatars (e.g. "h-7 w-7"). |
| BottomNavItem | IsActive | `bool?` | `` | Manual active-state override. When null, active is inferred from the current route matching Href. |
| BottomNavItem | OnClick | `EventCallback` | `` | Click handler — fires for both <a> and <button> renderings (link navigation still proceeds). |
| BottomNavItem | PressEffect | `Button.ButtonPressEffect` | `Button.ButtonPressEffect.None` | Visual feedback when the item is pressed. Default is None. Scale is recommended for a tactile feel on mobile. |
| BottomNavItem | Class | `string?` | `` | Additional CSS classes merged onto the root button/anchor element. |
| BottomNavItem | AdditionalAttributes | `Dictionary<string, object>?` | `` | Unmatched attributes are splatted onto the root button/anchor element. |

## Slots
- `ChildContent` (BottomNav) — The BottomNavItem (and optionally BottomNavFab) elements rendered inside the nav bar.
- `ChildContent` (BottomNavFab) — The icon (or other content) rendered inside the floating action button.
- `IconContent` (BottomNavItem) — Icon slot (use Icon or <SvgGlyph>). The Content suffix avoids colliding with the <Icon> component.
- `Badge` (BottomNavItem) — Optional badge (count, dot, or any content) shown on the icon. Int, string, or RenderFragment.

## Events
- (none)

## Sub-components
- `BottomNavFab`, `BottomNavItem`

## Cascading values it expects
- `Context` (`BottomNav.BottomNavContext?`)

## Services it injects
- `ILumeoLocalizer` (Lumeo.Services.Localization)
- `NavigationManager` ()
- `IComponentInteropService` (Lumeo.Services)

## Keyboard
—

## Example
```razor
<BottomNav />
```

## CSS variables
`--color-background`, `--color-border`, `--color-card`, `--color-foreground`, `--color-muted`, `--color-muted-foreground`, `--color-primary`, `--color-primary-foreground`, `--color-ring`, `--radius`

## Files
- `UI/BottomNav/BottomNav.razor`
- `UI/BottomNav/BottomNavFab.razor`
- `UI/BottomNav/BottomNavItem.razor`
